parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC start date as YYYY-MM-DD. If present, end must also be supplied.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Inclusive UTC end date as YYYY-MM-DD. If present, start must also be supplied.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: Convenience single-day export date as YYYY-MM-DD. Mutually exclusive with start/end.

parameters.name: owner_kind
parameters.description: Admin-only owner filter: all, user, or service_account.

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Explicit export granularity. Only daily is supported in v1.

302.description: Redirect back into the admin UI after OAuth sign-in
Redirect back into the admin UI after OIDC sign-in
